sqlMap.select: select * from AttorneyInPlaintiffForFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into AttorneyInPlaintiffForFirmLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey PlaintiffYrsExp PlaintiffPecOfTimeDev PlaintiffAttorneyName LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #PlaintiffYrsExp# #PlaintiffPecOfTimeDev# #PlaintiffAttorneyName# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('AttorneyInPlaintiffForFirmLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select AttorneyInPlaintiffKey, PlaintiffYrsExp, PlaintiffPecOfTimeDev, PlaintiffAttorneyName, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from AttorneyInPlaintiffForFirmLW where AttorneyInPlaintiffKey = #AttorneyInPlaintiffKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update AttorneyInPlaintiffForFirmLW set
PlaintiffYrsExp = #PlaintiffYrsExp# PlaintiffYrsExp = null PlaintiffPecOfTimeDev = #PlaintiffPecOfTimeDev# PlaintiffPecOfTimeDev = null PlaintiffAttorneyName = #PlaintiffAttorneyName# PlaintiffAttorneyName = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where AttorneyInPlaintiffKey = #AttorneyInPlaintiffKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from AttorneyInPlaintiffForFirmLW where AttorneyInPlaintiffKey = #AttorneyInPlaintiffKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from AttorneyInPlaintiffForFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select AttorneyInPlaintiffKey, PlaintiffYrsExp, PlaintiffPecOfTimeDev, PlaintiffAttorneyName, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from AttorneyInPlaintiffForFirmLW where AttorneyInPlaintiffKey = #AttorneyInPlaintiffKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select AttorneyInPlaintiffKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, PlaintiffYrsExp, PlaintiffPecOfTimeDev, PlaintiffAttorneyName, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from AttorneyInPlaintiffForFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select distinct AttorneyName as PlaintiffAttorneyName from AttorneyDetailsLW where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# order by AttorneyName asc
